mapper.insert: INSERT INTO feedbacks (user_id, type, title, content, images, status, target_type, target_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, 0, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE feedbacks SET reply = #{reply}, status = 2, replied_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
